self_integrity.scope: canonical JSON of the `evidence_pack` object below (this `envelope` excluded)
self_integrity.verify_procedure: node: sortDeep(evidence_pack) -> JSON.stringify -> sha256 hex; must equal evidence_pack_sha256
self_integrity.note: The hash is computed over json.dumps(evidence_pack, ensure_ascii=False, sort_keys=True, separators=(',',':')). Any edit to evidence_pack invalidates it.
self_integrity.canonicalization: JSON.stringify(sortDeep(evidence_pack)) — deep key-sort, no whitespace, UTF-8

ep_meta.generator: Claude Fable 5 (Claude Code) acting as Context Compiler
ep_meta.integrity_basis: All content_hash values are SHA-256 of the file bytes at generation time. Any later edit invalidates the hash; the receiving agent MUST re-hash before trusting a source as unchanged.

source_tier_legend.S1: Load-bearing production source code, behavior proven by automated tests
source_tier_legend.S2: Config / manifest / environment state (package.json, MCP config, git state)
source_tier_legend.S4: Author-generated planning/report docs (DIRECTION_DRAFT or report quality; NOT proof)
source_tier_legend.S5: Historical / superseded / external-repo evidence (do not treat as current)

ep_meta.confidence_policy: Trust order: current working-tree code (re-read) > automated test result > S1 hash match > S4 doc claims. Docs may lag code.

inherited_constraints: Address the user as 윤겸스; respond in Korean by default; pair hard technical terms with English.
Assume possibly non-developer; explain what changes and why.

APPROVAL GATE (per-action, per-session, do NOT generalize): git push, npm publish, vsce/marketplace publish, GitHub release, deployment, real API key entry/storage. Even if previously approved once, re-confirm each time.
Local file edits + local tests + MCP smoke test are allowed under the standing session approval.
Never read/modify .env/.pem/.key/secrets; never print secrets. .env is gitignored in primary repo.
Report in the fixed 6-category format: 실행한 것 / 발견한 것 / 수정한 것 / 다시 실행한 검증 / 아직 실행하지 않은 것 / 다음 승인 필요 항목.
stop-at-done: once a goal is closed, do NOT re-verify or re-implement finished work; record optional QA as backlog only.
Repair principle: 1 failure -> 1 cause -> smallest fix -> re-run -> report; never weaken a diagnostic to fake a pass.
Never claim a test/verification ran if it didn't; separate verified facts from assumptions.
Windows PowerShell 5.1 (CP949): keep .ps1 ASCII-only or UTF-8 BOM to avoid Korean-parse failures.
git identity for primary repo: gyeomsVibe <yoongyeomkim0515@gmail.com>; remote via SSH alias github-gyeoms using key ~/.ssh/id_ed25519_gyeoms.

handoff_specification.previous_response_id: UNAVAILABLE_IN_HARNESS - Claude Code sessions have no API response_id. Use head_commit 8ea0443 + this EP as the recovery anchor.
recovery_procedure: 1. cd primary_repo; run: git status --short && git log --oneline -6 && npm test
2. git show e01252f d575f9c 8ea0443  (re-diff the 3 parallel-session commits not in prior context - see C3)
3. Re-read src/dashboard.js and src/folder-picker.ps1 to confirm the CURRENT folder-selection + API-hardening implementation before trusting claims C-PICK-1/C-SEC-1.
4. Re-hash any S1 file you depend on and compare to source_manifest; mismatch = file changed since EP.
5. Resolve C2 first: ask 윤겸스 whether to commit the uncommitted 2.0.1 working set.
immediate_next_actions_ranked: A. Decide + (on approval) commit the uncommitted 2.0.1 working-tree changes; do NOT push without separate approval (C2).
B. MIA verification-only: drive the live dashboard in a browser to visually confirm Clinic Teal colors, Korean-path dropdown, sibling-folder auto-listing, '구현 방식' section (C4, C-MIA-1).
C. If asked: commit the 260714 external-repo migration + on-chain diagnostic in that repo (C6).
D. Optional: decide balance==0 WARNING rule (C5); update stale report doc 10 test count to 22 (C1).
handoff_specification.resume_prompt_for_new_window: 이전 세션(Vibe Clinic 2.0.x, 저장소 260709_vibe-clinic)을 데이터 손실 없이 이어간다. 방금 붙여넣은 EP(Evidence Pack)를 신뢰 기준으로 삼되, 코드는 항상 현재 작업 트리를 다시 읽어 확인해라. 마지막 확인 상태: HEAD=8ea0443(push 완료), 그러나 작업 트리에 2.0.1 미커밋 변경 존재, 테스트 22/22 통과, MIA 대시보드 리뉴얼·경로 인코딩·AI 스캐너 항목은 코드상 이미 구현 완료(육안 검수만 남음). 내 마지막 커밋(1e2e064) 이후 병렬 세션 커밋 3건(e01252f, d575f9c, 8ea0443)이 있으니 먼저 `git status`, `npm test`, 그리고 그 3개 커밋을 diff해서 현재 상태를 재확인한 뒤, EP의 unresolved_contradiction_ledger(C2·C3 우선)를 해소할 계획을 6분류로 제시해라. push/publish/배포는 매번 별도 승인이 필요하고, 나를 '윤겸스'로 부르고 한국어로 답해라. 먼저 재확인 결과부터 보고하고 다음 작업을 물어봐라.
